---
title: "Pulakesh Pradhan"
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 3
  categories: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/pulakesh.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com
---

I am a Geographer and Spatial Data Scientist specialized in GIS and Remote Sensing. My work leverages Google Earth Engine and AI to solve complex spatial problems.

::: {.home-stats}
[**418+** YouTube Subscribers]{.stat}
[**7,000+** Views]{.stat}
[**3+** Python Packages]{.stat}
:::

## 🚀 Innovations
[Spectral Curve App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral) | [Phenology App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature) | [Flood Tool](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility)

[Explore all Innovations →](software.qmd)

## 📌 Latest Posts
::: {#latest-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](blog.qmd)
